housing.title: Single women gain ground in affordable housing markets
housing.what: A 2025 HMDA analysis finds single women under 45 made 17.4% of New Orleans purchase loans vs 6.5% in San Jose and 11.4% nationally.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Build Housing Affordably Act introduced in House
housing.what: The measure would temporarily suspend the application of Build America, Buy America requirements for certain affordable housing projects.

housing.title: The private listings opt-out: impediment or enablement?
housing.what: States adopt three private listings models, mandate public marketing, opt out warnings in statute or agency written forms.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: SpaceX Employees Could Buy 2 in 5 San Antonio Homes With Their IPO Windfall
